diagrams.title: Programmed I/O
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the CPU directly controlling the flow of data between devices.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of programmed I/O.

diagrams.title: Interrupt-driven I/O
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the CPU being notified by an interrupt signal when a device is ready for data transfer.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of interrupt-driven I/O.

diagrams.title: DMA
diagrams.description: A diagram showing a device directly accessing memory without CPU intervention.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of DMA.
